description: Instructs agents to use the tndm ticket coordination CLI for task tracking and branch awareness in a monorepo.

defaultPrompt: Check tndm awareness against main before starting overlapping work
If the user asks about tickets or asks to create or update one, list open tndm tickets and summarize what is currently in flight
interface.longDescription: Use tndm to create and update repo-local tickets, inspect work in flight across branches, and keep Codex agents coordinated through explicit ticket and awareness workflows.
interface.shortDescription: Git-aware ticket coordination for Codex agents

name: tndm
